Translation.Description: Legends recount that Abyssal Greatswords were forged in the deepest recesses of the world's core. Their primary purpose was to serve as prisons for unruly Earth Elemental whose spirits were ripped from their physical shells and sealed within the enchanted metal for eternity.
Translation.Provides: Overpower- Wielder's attack damage is multiplied by the members of the defending group
Allows the wielder to cast Shockwave
